summary_en: 500,000 shares (4.40% of S/O) up to ¥200M via open-market purchase on TSE. Execution window 21 May–31 December 2026. Rationale: capital efficiency and future capital policy flexibility.
title_en: Notice of Determination of Matters Relating to Acquisition of Treasury Shares
translation_en_brief: JUST PLANNING INC. (TSE Standard: 4287) resolved on 20 May 2026 to acquire up to 500,000 treasury shares (4.40% of outstanding shares excluding treasury stock) for a maximum aggregate consideration of ¥200 million via open-market purchase on the Tokyo Stock Exchange. The acquisition period runs from 21 May 2026 through 31 December 2026. The stated rationale is to improve capital efficiency, return profits to shareholders, and enable flexible future capital policy execution. As of the resolution date, the company held 875,296 treasury shares against 11,354,592 issued shares (excluding treasury stock).
